Odia.skill: Read various types of materials in the Odia language (including newspapers, magazines, stories, and internet publications) to understand and write your preferences, comments, and expressions in the language or in braille
By studying a subject, comprehend the concepts that may exist within it.

English.skill: Compare between characters, events, ideas, themes and correlates them to their own life.

Science.skill: Simple techniques will be introduced to extract answers from asked questions. For instance, how to identify substances derived from colored flowers and how to determine whether green leaves contain chlorophyll.
Preparing and explaining graphical data, for instance, plotting distance against time graphs.
This involves creating and interpreting diagrams, such as anatomical diagrams of humans and plants, as well as preparation for experiments.

SST.skill: Explain the causes of forest fires, landslides, man-made disasters, and ways to mitigate disasters.

Odia.skill: Use correct grammar in framing sentences in Language use appropriate word to frame sentences
Read other materials alongside your textbook (such as children literature, main news articles, magazines, posters, etc.) and gain an understanding of them.
Explain the meanings of unfamiliar words from word lists
Interprets quotations, sayings and proverb etc.
Reflect on your personal reactions to various local, social, and natural events, for example - Why is there greenery around during the rainy season?
Reads textual/non-textual materials in Language/ Braille with comprehension.

EVS.skill: Identify specific characteristics, such as shape (head, limbs, teeth, skin surface), habitat (whether domesticated or wild), fruits, vegetables, and spices, along with their life cycles, uses (such as for food, medicine, decoration, etc.), and sensory attributes (such as smell, taste, preferences).
Describe the various skills involved in daily life (such as farming, hunting, weaving, and handicrafts) along with the importance of training (the role of programs) in enhancing these skills.

Maths.skill: Using the divisibility rules for 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 9, and 11, determine the factors, prime factors, cube, and cube roots of the provided numbers.
Determine the factors, prime factors, cube, and cube roots of the given numbers.
Solve problems using the measurement formulas of various shapes.
Demonstrate mathematical operations used in daily life.
Understand, identify, and extend geometric patterns based on symmetry.
Recognize the structure of multiplication and division up to the 9-times table.

SST.skill: Discuss the factors affecting biodiversity in flora and fauna (such as climate change, soil erosion, etc.).

miscon.subject: EVS
miscon.stem: On a cold night, Reena wrapped one plant in a plastic sheet and left another open. In the morning she saw water droplets only on the plastic sheet. Which process best explains this?
miscon.text: Children chose evaporation. The droplets form by condensation, water vapour turning to liquid on the cool sheet.
miscon.skill: Identify situations related to various events, including estimating conditions (distance, weight, time duration) and using regional units of measurement (like yards, feet, miles) while establishing relationships between various causes and effects through simple techniques (examples - condensation, evaporation, separation, etc.) related to the lifespan of flowers, fruits, and other natural resources.

miscon.subject: Science
miscon.stem: ଜଣେ ଛାତ୍ର ଏକ ପରୀକ୍ଷଣ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବାକୁ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏକ ସବୁଜ ପତ୍ର କ୍ଲୋରୋଫିଲ୍ ସାହାଯ୍ୟରେ ଖାଦ୍ୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରିଛି କି ନାହିଁ । କେଉଁଟି ସୋପାନଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମ ଅଟେ?
miscon.text: Children picked 'keep it in sunlight', confusing the plant's need for light with the starch-test procedure, which begins by boiling the leaf.
miscon.skill: Simple techniques will be introduced to extract answers from asked questions. For instance, how to identify substances derived from colored flowers and how to determine whether green leaves contain chlorophyll.

miscon.subject: Odia
miscon.stem: ଜଙ୍ଗଲ କ୍ଷୟ ର ମୂଖ୍ୟ କାରଣ କଣ ହୋଇଛି?

opts.A: ନୂଆଁ କାରଖାନା ଓ ଶିଳ୍ପ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ସ୍ଥାପନ।
opts.B: ଜଙ୍ଗଲକୁ ଘରବାଡ଼ିରେ ପରିଣତ କରି ଶହର ବିସ୍ତାର।
opts.C: ଚାଷଜମି ବଢ଼ାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଶୁନ୍ୟ କରିବା

miscon.text: Deforestation was blamed on factories and industry. The main cause is clearing forest to expand farmland.
miscon.skill: By studying a subject, comprehend the concepts that may exist within it.

miscon.subject: Science
miscon.stem: ନିମ୍ନରେ ଥିବା ଦୂରତା-ସମୟ ଗ୍ରାଫ୍ ଜଣେ ସାଇକେଲ ଚାଳକଙ୍କ ଗତିକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ । 4 ରୁ 6 ସେକେଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସମତଳ ଭୂସମାନ୍ତର ରେଖା କ'ଣ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ୱ କରେ?

opts.A: ସାଇକେଲ ଚାଳକ ସ୍ଥିର ବେଗରେ ଗତି କରୁଛନ୍ତି
opts.B: ସାଇକେଲ ଚାଳକ ଗତି କରୁନାହାଁନ୍ତି; ସେ ଅଟକି ଯାଇଛନ୍ତି
opts.C: ସାଇକେଲ ଚାଳକ ସେଠାରେ ନିଜର ଗତି ବଢ଼ାଉଛନ୍ତି
opts.D: ସାଇକେଲ ଚାଳକ ଦ୍ରୁତ ଗତିରେ ତଳକୁ ଓହ୍ଲାଇ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି

miscon.text: A flat line on a distance-time graph was read as 'moving at a steady speed'. A flat line there means the cyclist has stopped.
miscon.skill: Preparing and explaining graphical data, for instance, plotting distance against time graphs.

miscon.subject: Odia
miscon.stem: “କଲମର କାହାଣୀ” ଅନୁଛେଦ ଦ୍ୱାରା ମାନବ ପ୍ରଗତି ବିଷୟରେ କେଉଁ ବିଶାଳ ଧାରଣାକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯାଇଛି?

opts.A: ନିରନ୍ତର ନବୀନତା ଦିବାନିଶି ସମସ୍ୟା ସମାଧାନ କରି ଜୀବନକୁ ଭଲ କରିଥାଏ।
opts.B: ଆଧୁନିକ ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତିବିଦ୍ୟା  ସବୁ ପୁରୁଣା ଉଦ୍ଭାବନକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବେ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରେ।
opts.C: ନୂଆ ଉପକରଣ ତିଆରିରେ ସୃଜନଶୀଳତା ଠାରୁ ପାରମ୍ପରିକତା ଅଧିକ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ।
opts.D: ଅଧିକାଂଶ ଉଦ୍ଭାବନ ଆକସ୍ମିକ ଭାବେ ଘଟେ ଓ ତାହାର କୌଣସି ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ନଥାଏ।

miscon.text: Children picked an absolute statement (new technology fully replaces the old) over the passage's nuanced idea that steady, ongoing innovation keeps improving life.
miscon.skill: By studying a subject, comprehend the concepts that may exist within it.

miscon.subject: SST
miscon.stem: ପାହାଡିଆ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ବାନାଗ୍ନି ସାଧାରଣ କାରଣ କେଉଁଟି ?

opts.A: ବିଜୁଳି ଦ୍ବାରା ଶୁଷ୍କ ଗଛରେ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିବ।
opts.B: ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ଢାଲୁ ନିଆଁ କୁ ବଢ଼ାଇବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।
opts.C: ଲିଭି ନଥିବା ନିଆଁ କିମ୍ବା କ୍ୟାମ୍ପ ଅଗ୍ନି ରୁ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିବ।

miscon.text: Forest fires were blamed on lightning. The common cause in hilly areas is an unextinguished campfire, that is, human carelessness.
miscon.skill: Explain the causes of forest fires, landslides, man-made disasters, and ways to mitigate disasters.

miscon.subject: Odia
miscon.stem: ଲେଖା ଆଧାରରେ, ସବୁଠାରୁ ଯୁକ୍ତିସଙ୍ଗତ ମତ କେଉଁଟି?

opts.A: ବିଶ୍ୱରେ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଆବରଣ ବଢ଼ିଛି, ତେଣୁ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ସଂରକ୍ଷଣ ପାଇଁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା ନ କଲେ ଚଳିବ ।
opts.B: ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଆବରଣ ବଢ଼ୁଛି, ତଥାପି ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ କମ୍ ଥିବା ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଚିନ୍ତା।
opts.C: ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଦେଶ ସମାନ ଭାବରେ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ସଂରକ୍ଷଣରେ ଅଂଶ ନ ନେବା ଚିନ୍ତାଜନକ ।
opts.D: ଜଳବାୟୁ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଓ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ କମିବା- ଏମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ କିଛି ସମ୍ପର୍କ ନାହିଁ।

miscon.text: Children chose a general fairness statement over the inference the passage supports, that protected forest area stays too low even as forest cover rises.
miscon.skill: Read various types of materials in the Odia language (including newspapers, magazines, stories, and internet publications) to understand and write your preferences, comments, and expressions in the language or in braille

miscon.subject: English
miscon.stem: Which home action best mirrors banning old polluting vehicles?

opts.A: Buy more vehicles for every individual at home
opts.B: Plant more trees in your neighbourhood
opts.C: Swap old devices for energy-saving ones
opts.D: Switch off lights and fans when not in use

miscon.text: Children chose a generally 'green' action rather than the true parallel to scrapping old polluting vehicles, which is replacing old devices with energy-saving ones.
miscon.skill: Compare between characters, events, ideas, themes and correlates them to their own life.

miscon.subject: English
miscon.stem: Where does a sea turtle begin its life?
miscon.text: Children think a sea turtle's life begins in the ocean; it actually hatches on the beach. A read-from-text slip.
miscon.skill: Identifies characters, main ideas and sequence of ideas and events in textual / non textual material
